rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0001
rows.name: We did it, mo! Impressive, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0002
rows.name: Dammit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0003
rows.name: Are you alright?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0005
rows.name: Momomomo, you were a robot, mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0005_m
rows.name: Momomomo, you were a robot, mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0005_f
rows.name: Momomomo, you were a robot, mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0006
rows.name: Blocking feedback to the nerve circuit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0007
rows.name: Still hurt?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0008
rows.name: Could it be[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0009
rows.name:
You don't remember anything about
your body being a B.B., do you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0010
rows.name: Biocirculatory fluid is leaking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0010_m
rows.name: Biocirculatory fluid is leaking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0010_f
rows.name: Biocirculatory fluid is leaking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0011
rows.name: Anyway, I'll do some first aid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0012
rows.name: Elma-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0013
rows.name:
I need you to contact the B.B.
Maintenance Center for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0014
rows.name:
Ask them to have a type 085 B.B.
left arm and transfusion ready![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0015
rows.name: Got it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0016
rows.name:
We'll do the proper regeneration work back
at NLA, so until then, please sleep.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05130100_MSG0017
rows.name:
It's okay. Don't worry.
I'll definitely save you![ST:wait ]
